updateDelayHints.default: This provider has not produced a fresh local signal for more than {minutes} minutes. Some sources only update when their CLI or app writes new usage data.
updateDelayHints.codex: Codex limits normally update through the local app-server. If this stays old, the app-server may be unavailable or Codex has not produced fresh live limit data.
updateDelayHints.codexSpark: Codex Spark limits normally update through the local Codex app-server. If this stays old, Spark live limit data may not be exposed yet.
updateDelayHints.claudeCode: This Claude Code card combines statusline, local logs, and Claude.ai billing or usage data. Updates can lag when Claude Code is closed, the statusline has not run, or Claude.ai cookies/API access are unavailable.
updateDelayHints.copilot: GitHub Copilot CLI usage is written after sessions shut down, and live quota probing depends on the local Copilot CLI. The timestamp can lag while a session is still open or the probe is unavailable.
updateDelayHints.gemini: Gemini local usage updates only when local log files contain new usage metadata.
updateDelayHints.ollama: Ollama usage updates only when requests pass through the dashboard's local proxy/log file.
